name: Reflex
short_description: A simple puzzle game. Simple graphics and nice music. Try your mind in more than 70+ levels. They are waiting for you.
detailed_description:
You need to solve puzzles. Destroy all shapes. If you cant pass level just click on hint button. Click on screen to open menu and choose levels. Hold mouse button and try to destroy shapes after that will be next level. There are 70 levels that will more difficult than previous one



Game Features :
Addictive levels
Simple Graphics
Use hint to clear the Levels
More than 70+ levels
Easy achievements
Custom achievements
